title: Zveltio Extension Manifest v2
description: Contract for extensions published to the marketplace. Replaces the v1 `.ts` source-shipping path entirely — engine v2 refuses any extension whose engine.entry doesn't end in .js (outside the local ZVELTIO_EXTENSION_DEV_RELOAD=1 dev workflow, which doesn't go through the marketplace). All fields here mirror what the engine's ManifestSchema (packages/engine/src/lib/extension-loader.ts) parses today, plus the new v2 additions (engine block, integrity, bundlePeers). See docs/EXTENSIONS-V2-PHASE1.md.

name.description: Slug. MUST match the extension folder slug exactly. Forward slashes allowed for nested categories (e.g. compliance/ro/efactura).

displayName.description: Human-readable name shown in Studio + marketplace UI.

description.description: One-paragraph summary shown in the marketplace listing.

category.description: Top-level catalog category. See zveltio-extensions/README.md for the canonical list.

package.description: Optional npm package name (e.g. `@zveltio/ext-crm`). Used by the publish pipeline.

zveltioMinVersion.description: Lowest engine version this extension is known to work against. Engine compares against its own ENGINE_VERSION at enable time.

zveltioMaxVersion.description: Highest engine version this extension was validated against. `null` means no upper bound.

entry.description: Relative path to the engine entry point. MUST end in `.js`. Authors editing live use ZVELTIO_EXTENSION_DEV_RELOAD=1 + a `.ts` on disk, but every PUBLISHED manifest names the `.js` artifact.

format.description: Module format. ESM only — CommonJS unsupported.

target.description: Runtime requirement. Future-proofs for Node-only extensions (native addons Bun doesn't support).

bundled.description: true = hono/zod/kysely/@hono/zod-validator are bundled into entry. The engine's CORE_NPM_PACKAGES presence check is skipped for bundled:true. false = these come from peerDependencies (reserved for the runtime-barrel path, Phase 1.5).

bundlePeers.description: true = the publisher bundled all peerDependencies into entry as well. false (default) = peerDependencies come from an allow-list of native/oversized packages and are installed by the engine at enable time.

pages.description: Studio page contributions. Each entry registers a Svelte page in the admin Studio. The path is the URL under /admin where the page mounts; the engine merges these into the Studio nav at enable time.

path.description: URL path, e.g. `/admin/crm`. Either /admin/* (Studio) or /portal/* (client portal).

schema.description: Path (relative to studio/) to a declarative SDUI page schema, e.g. `schemas/crm.json`. When present the page renders from JSON via the generic host (no +page.svelte, no per-host build); when absent the page is a hand-written studio/pages/<slug>/+page.svelte. See EXTENSION-DEVELOPER-GUIDE §10.

navGroup.description: Optional per-page nav group. Falls back to the top-level `studio.navGroup`.
Default sidebar group for all pages declared above (business, communications, hr, …).

dependencies.description: Inter-extension dependencies. The engine refuses to enable until all listed dependencies are themselves enabled.

peerDependencies.description: Bare-specifier npm packages from a curated allow-list (imapflow, sharp, native-binding deps). Core deps (hono/zod/kysely/@hono/zod-validator) MUST NOT appear here — they live in engine.entry per engine.bundled=true. When engine.bundlePeers=true, the engine SKIPS the install step; otherwise it runs `bun install` at enable time.

requires.description: Database-level requirements the engine asserts before enable.

postgres_extensions.description: Postgres extensions to CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS, e.g. postgis, pg_trgm.

permissions.description: Capability flags the extension requests (database, settings, secrets, network, etc.).

contributes.description: Declares what this extension contributes to the engine + Studio.

fieldTypes.description: Custom field types this extension registers (e.g. `vector`, `geometry`).

quotas.description: Resource limits the engine enforces at install time. Defaults are generous; publishers can tighten per-extension.

nodeModulesSizeMbMax.description: Maximum disk size of installed peerDependencies (MB).

migrationsMax.description: Maximum number of SQL migrations the engine will run for this extension.

runtime.description: Extension runtime. `js` = ESM module loaded via dynamic import. `wasm` = experimental capability-bound WebAssembly host. WASM remains experimental in v2 and is not on the Phase 1 critical path.

engineSha256.description: SHA-256 of the bundled engine/index.js file. Engine recomputes at load time and refuses on mismatch.

archiveSha256.description: SHA-256 of the .zvext archive itself. Registry recomputes on upload and at download/install time on the client.
